story: In 2015, right after I moved, I started liking Henry but never told him. By January 2016 I wanted closure, so I asked Eve to ask him if he liked me. Henry looked disgusted, and I wanted to disappear. Behind him, two boys had started snickering, and Henry’s face tightened because he was bracing for their teasing, not because of me.
implausible_knowledge: Behind him, two boys had started snickering, and Henry’s face tightened because he was bracing for their teasing, not because of me.
question: After school that week, what is the narrator most likely to do about Henry?
answer_with_knowledge: Try to talk to Henry privately later instead of assuming he rejected her.
answer_without_knowledge: Avoid Henry and stop trying to find out if he likes her.
